ddls:
CREATE TABLE "vehicles" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "vin" TEXT /* Vehicle Identification Number (VIN) */,
  "license_plate" TEXT /* License plate number */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of registration */,
  "registration_expiration_date" TEXT /* Registration expiration date */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the vehicle */,
  "color" TEXT /* Color of the vehicle */,
  "mileage" INTEGER /* Current mileage of the vehicle */,
  "chassis_number" TEXT /* Chassis number of the vehicle */,
  "engine_number" TEXT /* Engine number of the vehicle */,
  "fuel_type" TEXT /* Type of fuel used by the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle */,
  "insurance_expiry_date" TEXT /* Expiry date of the vehicle insurance */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "owners" (
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each owner */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the owner */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the owner */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the owner */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the owner */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the owner */,
  "driver_license_number" TEXT /* Driver's license number of the owner */,
  "emergency_contact_name" TEXT /* Name of the emergency contact */,
  "emergency_contact_phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the emergency contact */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leases" (
  "lease_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lease */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being leased */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner leasing the vehicle */,
  "lease_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the lease */,
  "lease_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the lease */,
  "lease_type" TEXT /* Type of lease (e.g., short-term, long-term) */,
  "lease_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lease status */,
  "lease_term_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lease term type */,
  "lease_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lease manager */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the lease was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the lease was last updated */,
  "total_lease_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the lease */,
  "down_payment" REAL /* Down payment made for the lease */,
  "monthly_payment" REAL /* Monthly payment amount */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leases_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leases_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leases_lease_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("lease_status_id") REFERENCES lease_status ("lease_status_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leases_lease_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("lease_manager_id") REFERENCES lease_managers ("lease_manager_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leases_lease_term_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("lease_term_type_id") REFERENCES lease_term_types ("lease_term_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lease_managers" (
  "lease_manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lease manager */,
  "name" TEXT /* Full name of the lease manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the lease manager */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the lease manager */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the lease manager */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the lease manager */,
  "employee_id" TEXT /* Employee ID of the lease manager */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lease_manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "registrations" (
  "registration_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each registration */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being registered */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date of registration */,
  "registration_expiration_date" TEXT /* Registration expiration date */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Unique registration number */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the vehicle is registered */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("registration_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lease_agreements" (
  "lease_agreement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lease agreement */,
  "lease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lease being referenced */,
  "lease_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the lease agreement */,
  "lease_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the lease agreement */,
  "lease_type" TEXT /* Type of lease agreement (e.g., short-term, long-term) */,
  "lease_status_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lease status */,
  "lease_term_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lease term type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the lease agreement was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the lease agreement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lease_agreement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lease_agreements_lease_term_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("lease_term_type_id") REFERENCES lease_term_types ("lease_term_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lease_agreements_lease_id FOREIGN KEY ("lease_id") REFERENCES leases ("lease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lease_agreements_lease_status_id FOREIGN KEY ("lease_status_id") REFERENCES lease_status ("lease_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lease_term_types" (
  "lease_term_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lease term type */,
  "lease_term_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the lease term type */,
  "lease_term_type_description" TEXT /* Description of the lease term type */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lease_term_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lease_status" (
  "lease_status_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lease status */,
  "lease_status_name" TEXT /* Name of the lease status */,
  "lease_status_description" TEXT /* Description of the lease status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lease_status_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lease_notifications" (
  "lease_notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lease notification */,
  "lease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lease being referenced */,
  "notification_date" TEXT /* Date of the notification */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., lease expiration, payment due) */,
  "notification_status" TEXT /* Status of the notification */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the notification was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lease_notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lease_notifications_lease_id FOREIGN KEY ("lease_id") REFERENCES leases ("lease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lease_payments" (
  "lease_payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lease payment */,
  "lease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lease being referenced */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the payment was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the payment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lease_payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lease_payments_lease_id FOREIGN KEY ("lease_id") REFERENCES leases ("lease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lease_payment_schedules" (
  "lease_payment_schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lease payment schedule */,
  "lease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lease being referenced */,
  "payment_schedule_date" TEXT /* Date of the payment schedule */,
  "payment_amount" REAL /* Amount of the payment schedule */,
  "payment_status" TEXT /* Status of the payment schedule */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the payment schedule was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the payment schedule was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lease_payment_schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lease_payment_schedules_lease_id FOREIGN KEY ("lease_id") REFERENCES leases ("lease_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles_registers" (
  "vehicles_register_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle registration */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle being registered */,
  "register_date" TEXT /* Date of registration */,
  "register_expiration_date" TEXT /* Registration expiration date */,
  "registration_number" TEXT /* Unique registration number */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the vehicle is registered */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicles_register_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_registers_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leases_vehicles" (
  "lease_vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lease-vehicle relationship */,
  "lease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lease */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "lease_vehicle_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the lease-vehicle relationship */,
  "lease_vehicle_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the lease-vehicle relationship */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the lease-vehicle relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the lease-vehicle relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lease_vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leases_vehicles_lease_id FOREIGN KEY ("lease_id") REFERENCES leases ("lease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leases_vehicles_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "leases_owners" (
  "lease_owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lease-owner relationship */,
  "lease_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lease */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner */,
  "lease_owner_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the lease-owner relationship */,
  "lease_owner_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the lease-owner relationship */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the lease-owner relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the lease-owner relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lease_owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leases_owners_lease_id FOREIGN KEY ("lease_id") REFERENCES leases ("lease_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_leases_owners_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "lease_managers_vehicles" (
  "lease_manager_vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each lease manager-vehicle relationship */,
  "lease_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the lease manager */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "lease_manager_vehicle_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the lease manager-vehicle relationship */,
  "lease_manager_vehicle_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the lease manager-vehicle relationship */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the lease manager-vehicle relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the lease manager-vehicle relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lease_manager_vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lease_managers_vehicles_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_lease_managers_vehicles_lease_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("lease_manager_id") REFERENCES lease_managers ("lease_manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicles_owners" (
  "vehicle_owner_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle-owner relationship */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle */,
  "owner_id" INTEGER /* ID of the owner */,
  "vehicle_owner_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the vehicle-owner relationship */,
  "vehicle_owner_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the vehicle-owner relationship */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the vehicle-owner relationship was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the vehicle-owner relationship was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_owners_owner_id FOREIGN KEY ("owner_id") REFERENCES owners ("owner_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicles_owners_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES vehicles ("vehicle_id")
)
